name: Cheesecat
description:
That cheese thing shouldn’t have been abandoned for some scientists cause yet I should get too attached I’m sure it’ll be fine anyway. - Eve

Making this at 2am for no reason

They are a cheese like slugcat despite being literally cheese along with the rest of their body they will leave a faint trail of cheese wherever they go and most definitely ruin someone’s apartment or house unless cleaned of course.

Artist is from Meowsk.o from twitter I believe

Still working on Eve that other scug or I could just put the duo of both and them whatever I gotta wait on some art anyway.
